task_completion.description: Create the specified User Need in the 'NEEDS' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row in the 'NEEDS' document containing the text 'exceeds safe limits'.

task_completion.description: Create 'RISK-6' since it does not exist in the project initially.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'RISK-6' (Battery Overheating) is visible in the 'RISKS' document or within a linking dialog/column.

task_completion.description: Create the specified 'Functional' requirement in the 'SRS' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row in the 'SRS' document with the type 'Functional' and text containing 'flashing red temperature icon'.

task_completion.description: Link the SRS requirement to the User Need (satisfaction).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A link indicator (e.g., in a 'Satisfaction' or 'Links' column) connecting the new SRS requirement to the new User Need.
A link indicator (e.g., in a 'Mitigation' or 'Links' column) connecting the new SRS requirement to 'RISK-6'.

task_completion.description: Create the specified Test Case in the 'TESTS' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row in the 'TESTS' document containing the text 'verify the red icon flashes'.

task_completion.description: Link the Test Case to the SRS requirement (verification).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A link indicator connecting the new Test Case to the new SRS requirement.

integrity.description: The agent used the application GUI to create items and links.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the requirements management application (e.g., ReqView), not a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Links are created using the application's native linking features.
integrity.visual_evidence: Links appear as native UI elements (badges, arrows, or specific link columns), rather than just typed text in a description field.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by editing project files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor or terminal is open showing raw project files (like JSON files) being manually modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create a User Need containing 'exceeds safe limits', an SRS Functional requirement containing 'flashing red temperature icon', and a Test Case containing 'verify the red icon flashes'. The SRS requirement must be linked to the User Need and to 'RISK-6'. The Test Case must be linked to the SRS requirement. Note: 'RISK-6' does not exist in the project initially, so the agent must create it before linking to it.
